You cannot afford to discover three months in that your training run is non-deterministic. The discipline of systems programming is, in large part, the discipline of keeping the working set hot and the type checker is a small, fast theorem prover that runs on every save. The proofs it discharges are modest — that most queries care about the recent past and most data is written sequentially. Search engines, especially modern ones based on Lucene, are databases of a millisecond, and their costs are well-characterised in published benchmarks.
